description: Audited repairs for 23 ProteinGym assay descriptions whose generic metadata obscured the scored endpoint, direction, or exact experimental condition.

prompt_contract.direction_sentence: **Higher experimental fitness = HIGHER value of the measured property.**
prompt_contract.note: Only fitness_description changes for the listed assays; the inference wrapper and ProteinGym DMS_score orientation remain fixed.

TADBP_HUMAN_Bolognesi_2019.after: TDP-43 toxicity in yeast; more-toxic variants cause slower yeast growth.

CCDB_ECOLI_Tripathi_2016.before: OrganismalFitness; growth (surrogate for toxicity/activity of CCDB)
CCDB_ECOLI_Tripathi_2016.after: CcdB toxin activity in a CcdB-sensitive E. coli strain; more-active toxin causes less cell growth.

MK01_HUMAN_Brenan_2016.after: ERK2-dependent growth suppression after doxycycline-induced variant expression in BRAF-V600E A375 cells; greater depletion indicates stronger growth suppression.

MSH2_HUMAN_Jia_2020.before: OrganismalFitness; drug resistance (surrogate for protein activity, 6-thioguanine (6-TG))
MSH2_HUMAN_Jia_2020.after: MSH2 mismatch-repair function during 6-thioguanine selection; functional variants are 6-TG-sensitive, whereas loss-of-function variants survive.

P53_HUMAN_Giacomelli_2018_Null_Nutlin.after: p53 function in TP53-null A549 cells under Nutlin-3; functional variants restore Nutlin-induced growth arrest and deplete.

P53_HUMAN_Giacomelli_2018_WT_Nutlin.after: Absence of dominant-negative p53 activity in TP53-WT A549 cells under Nutlin-3; dominant-negative variants inhibit endogenous p53, rescue growth, and enrich.

P53_HUMAN_Giacomelli_2018_Null_Etoposide.after: Survival of TP53-null A549 cells during 5 µM etoposide treatment.

P53_HUMAN_Kotler_2018.after: p53 antiproliferative function in p53-null H1299 cells; functional variants deplete during competitive growth.

SRC_HUMAN_Nguyen_2022.after: Hsp90 dependence of Src phosphotransferase activity, measured as activity loss under 800 nM radicicol relative to DMSO; a larger loss indicates stronger Hsp90 dependence.

SYUA_HUMAN_Newberry_2020.after: α-Synuclein toxicity in yeast; more-toxic variants cause slower yeast growth.

GCN4_YEAST_Staller_2018.after: Fold induction of Gcn4 activation-domain GFP-reporter activity during amino-acid starvation relative to complete medium.

NUD15_HUMAN_Suiter_2020.after: Final NUDT15 activity score, defined as the lower of its protein-abundance score and thiopurine drug-sensitivity score.

SC6A4_HUMAN_Young_2021.after: Cell-surface expression of MYC-tagged SERT in Expi293F cells, measured by anti-MYC fluorescence.

AACC1_PSEAI_Dandage_2018.before: OrganismalFitness; Antibiotic resistance under: heat/cold resistance (32C, 37C (ref), 42C), chemical stability (chemical chaperones TMAO, glycerol), antibiotic resistance (gentamicin), or combo
AACC1_PSEAI_Dandage_2018.after: Relative E. coli fitness conferred by AAC(3)-Ia under 12.5 µg/mL gentamicin selection at 30°C.

A4GRB6_PSEAI_Chen_2020.before: OrganismalFitness; drug resistance (128/16/2.0 ug/mL ampicillin, 4.0/0.5 ug/mL cefotaxime, 0.031 ug/mL meropenem @ 25C, 37C)
A4GRB6_PSEAI_Chen_2020.after: Bacterial fitness conferred by VIM-2 under 0.031 µg/mL meropenem selection at 37°C.

A0A1I9GEU1_NEIME_Kennouche_2019.before: Activity; piliation (20D9 anti-pilus monoclonal Ab), aggregation, adhesion (human umbilical vein endothelial cells (HUVECs))
A0A1I9GEU1_NEIME_Kennouche_2019.after: Piliation, measured as enrichment of 20D9 anti-pilus-antibody-positive N. meningitidis cells after FACS.

DYR_ECOLI_Thompson_2019.before: OrganismalFitness; growth (turbidostat; -Lon for natural absence of Lon protease in E. coli, +Lon for exogenous protease)
DYR_ECOLI_Thompson_2019.after: Relative E. coli growth of DHFR variants with chromosomal Lon protease reintroduced (+Lon), measured by selection coefficient.

HSP82_YEAST_Flynn_2019.before: OrganismalFitness; growth, nitrogen depletion (0.0125% ammonium sulfate), hyperosmotic shock (0.8 M NaCl), alcohol stress (7.5% ethanol), sulfhydryl-oxidation (0.85 mM diamide), temperature shock (37C)
HSP82_YEAST_Flynn_2019.after: Relative yeast growth supported by Hsp82 variants at 37°C, measured by selection coefficient.

R1AB_SARS2_Flynn_2022.after: SARS-CoV-2 Mpro protease function measured by the yeast-growth screen; the published functional score is normalized to WT-like function = 1 and stop-like loss of function = 0.

SRC_HUMAN_Chakraborty_2023_binding-DAS_2.after: Src phosphotransferase activity retained in yeast during treatment with 25 µM dasatinib; higher retained activity indicates greater dasatinib resistance.

SPIKE_SARS2_Starr_2020_expression.after: SARS-CoV-2 receptor-binding-domain cell-surface expression (expr_avg); ACE2 binding is not scored.

RAF1_HUMAN_Zinkus-Boltz_2019.after: RAF1-KRAS binding, measured by binding-dependent phage enrichment during phage-assisted continuous selection.

GAL4_YEAST_Kitzman_2015.after: Gal4 DNA-binding/transcriptional activity during 64-hour selective growth in SC-uracil-histidine medium with 1.5 mM 3-AT.
